channel.title: Maine Annual Report Filing Notices
channel.description: Static informational page describing the June 1 annual-report deadline and solicitation warnings; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Annual Report Filing Notices
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
